title: Nursing gig work at Attendo in the Ylä-Savo region
salary_range: Competitive hourly wage based on Finnish collective agreements.
jobcontent:
We are looking for experts in the care industry for gig work in the Ylä-Savo area, either in the Attendo Oma substitute pool or you can also work in one of our Attendo homes. There are a total of 4 Attendo homes for the elderly in the area; Attendo Pihlajaharju and Iisakki in Iisalmi, Attendo Pajuharju in Lapinlahti and Attendo Kesälampi in Vieremä. When you work in the Attendo Oma-substitute pool, you can work in all the Attendo homes in the area with the same employment contract, we pay a rotating gig worker in addition to the basic salary a task-specific supplement based on the rotating work. You can choose how many shifts you do - this way you can fit the work in, for example, with another job, study or family leave side by side. We commit to a paid orientation at the beginning of the employment relationship. Through gig work, you can also open up opportunities for longer-term substitutes or a permanent employment relationship with Attendo, if you wish. What do we expect from you? A degree in the social and health field or you are a field student, at least two parts of the degree have been completed in practical nursing studies Vaccination protection as referred to in Section 48 of the Infectious Diseases Act to protect customers and patients for the entire duration of the employmentHygiene pass or readiness to complete it within three months of the employment from the startFluent Finnish language skills, at least level B1.1 We require medical licenses from graduates or the readiness to obtain them at the very beginning of the employment relationship What do we offer you? We walk by your side With Attendo, your predecessor is not far away, but present in everyday life, supporting and walking by your side. With us, you are an important part of the multiprofessional team that makes the home a home for our residents. We support your development. With Attendo, development opportunities are real, not just talk. We have a wide range of training, and we encourage all our employees to train and, if they wish, to advance in their careers. We are flexible with you Balance between working life and other life is important to us. With us, you can work flexibly on gigs. In terms of employment and salary, we follow the collective agreement of the private social service industry. Please note that we are a smoke-free workplace. Are you interested? The application period is until May 10, 2026, but don't wait, take advantage of the opportunity to become part of our team, we will fill the positions as soon as a suitable applicant is found! For more information about the position, please contact the recruitment coordinator. Please send your job application only through the recruitment system. Here for you. Recruitment coordinator's contact information: Jenna Niskanenjenna.niskanen@attendo.fi044 494 2292Attendo Future care leader Attendo is the leading provider of care services in the Nordic countries. Our mission is to strengthen people so that everyone who lives with us can live a life that is full of their own way. We offer care and housing services for the elderly, the mentally disabled, the disabled, those in substance abuse and mental health rehabilitation, as well as those in need of child protection and therapy. We are above all a home for our residents, a partner for our stakeholders and a strong force for change in society. More than 18,000 of our employees serve in more than 400 offices around Finland. We strengthen people. We look forward. We will solve together. We are Attendo.www.attendo.fi

Attendo The trendsetter of future care
Attendo is the leading provider of care services in the Nordic countries. Our mission is to strengthen people so that everyone who lives with us can live a full life in their own way. We offer care and housing services for the elderly, mentally disabled, disabled, drug and mental health rehabilitators. We also offer therapy services. We are above all a home for our residents, a partner for our stakeholders and a strong force for change in society. About 17,000 of our employees serve in more than 400 offices around Finland. We strengthen people. We look forward. We solve together. We are Attendo.
